pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) and export_result.sh (line 8) both specify identical path
Task description section headings and verifier.py line 92 both specify these exact four layers
Task description states 'Outer border: Circle, Radius 50mm, Center (0,0)'. Verifier accepts 49.0-51.0mm tolerance (lines 121-122). Metadata value 50 is exact center of tolerance.
Task description states 'Mounting hole: Circle, Radius 3mm, Center (0,0)'. Verifier accepts 2.5-3.5mm tolerance (line 123). Metadata value 3 is exact center of tolerance.
Task description states 'All ticks extend OUTWARD from radius 40mm'. Verifier checks 39.0-41.0mm tolerance (line 154). Metadata value 40 is exact center of tolerance.
Task description specifies 'Arc indicating 80-100 PSI range. Radius: 40mm.' Verifier checks 39.0-41.0mm tolerance (line 198). Metadata value 40 is exact center of tolerance.
Task description states 'Scale Sweep: 270 degrees total, starting at 225° (South-West) and rotating clockwise to -45°/315° (South-East)'. Verified by calculation: 225° - 270° = -45° ✓
Task description states end at -45° (equivalent to 315° in 0-360 range)
Task description hint states '270° / 100 PSI = 2.7° per PSI'. Verified by calculation: 270 / 100 = 2.7 ✓
Task specifies major ticks at 0, 10, 20, ..., 100 PSI. Count: (100 / 10) + 1 = 11
Task specifies minor ticks at 5, 15, 25, ..., 95 PSI (every 5 PSI between majors). Count: 10
11 major ticks + 10 minor ticks = 21 total. Verifier expects ≥18 for full credit (line 159)
Task description specifies 'An Arc indicating the 80-100 PSI range' on DANGER layer
Danger zone is 20 PSI (100-80). Span = 20 × 2.7°/PSI = 54°. Verifier expects 40-68° tolerance (line 223)
setup_task.sh deletes output file (line 9) and export_result.sh verifies file_created_during_task (line 21). Task generates DXF from scratch; no pre-existing dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The pressure gauge face task is a generative task with no pre-existing dataset. All metadata claims have been verified against the task description and verifier logic. The task requires creating a 0-100 PSI pressure gauge design in LibreCAD with four layers: PLATE (outer circle r=50mm, mounting hole r=3mm), TICKS (21 tick marks from r=40mm), LABELS (text 0-100), and DANGER (arc at r=40mm spanning 80-100 PSI range). The gauge uses a 270° angular sweep from 225° to 315°, equivalent to 2.7° per PSI. The danger arc spans exactly 54° (20 PSI range). All geometry specifications have exact nominal values matched to tolerance ranges in the verifier logic.
